results.rendered_html:
apahan 2 P.
1 To ward or beat off, repel, destroy, kill, take away, remove; apaghnaṃto duritaṃ havyagaṃdhaiḥ  Ś. 4. 7 ; na tu khalu tayorjñāne śaktiṃ karotyapahaṃti vā  U. 2. 4  takes away;  Ms. 6. 96 ; apahatapāpmānaṃ savitāramupatiṣṭhasva  U. 3. 
2 To attack, affect, seize (as disease &c.).
3 To husk out, take off the shell or husk (as rice).
4 To shoot out.
